summary.en: Adla curates clothes for free at-home try-on, charging only for what you keep and picking up returns.
summary.zh: Adla 精選衣物供免費在家試穿,只對你留下的商品收費,並負責取回退貨。

highlight.en: Operates a try-before-you-buy e-commerce model that starts on college campuses, removing upfront cost and handling pickups for returns.
highlight.zh: 採用先試後買的電商模式,從大學校園起步,免去預付成本並代為處理退貨取件。

summary.en: Kern Systems develops enzyme-based methods and digital codecs to store data in DNA.
summary.zh: Kern Systems 開發以酵素為基礎的方法與數位編解碼器,將資料儲存於 DNA 中。

highlight.en: Tackles the high cost of synthesizing DNA, the main barrier to using its density and longevity as a data storage medium.
highlight.zh: 專注解決 DNA 合成成本過高的問題,這是發揮其高密度與長壽特性作為資料儲存媒介的主要障礙。

summary.en: Flow builds products to make web browsing more organized and intentful.
summary.zh: Flow 打造產品,讓網頁瀏覽更有條理、更具目的性。

highlight.en: Treats the browser as an everyday tool that lacks organization, building an 'intentful browsing' product to improve the experience.
highlight.zh: 將瀏覽器視為缺乏條理的日常工具,打造「有目的的瀏覽」產品來改善使用體驗。

summary.en: Asher Bio develops precisely targeted immunotherapies for cancer and other diseases.
summary.zh: Asher Bio 開發針對癌症與其他疾病的精準標靶免疫療法。

highlight.en: Its cis-targeting platform aims to selectively activate specific immune cell types, addressing the limitations of pleiotropic immunotherapies.
highlight.zh: 其順式標靶平台旨在選擇性活化特定免疫細胞類型,克服作用於多種細胞的廣效免疫療法之侷限。

summary.en: Fit to Form is a site where women shop for dresses based on their fit.
summary.zh: Fit to Form 是一個讓女性依據合身度選購洋裝的網站。

highlight.en: Focuses on dress shopping organized around individual fit, helping women find garments suited to their measurements.
highlight.zh: 專注於以個人合身度為核心的洋裝選購,協助女性找到符合自身尺寸的服飾。

summary.en: Safely Finance offers a buy-now-pay-later solution for moving and renting.
summary.zh: Safely Finance 提供搬家與租屋的先買後付方案。

highlight.en: Embeds pay-over-time financing into moving and renting via widget, API, or property management tools to remove price as a barrier for renters.
highlight.zh: 透過小工具、API 或物業管理系統將分期付款嵌入搬家與租屋流程,消除租客的價格障礙。

summary.en: ReverCare connects families to social workers who help find and vet elder care solutions.
summary.zh: ReverCare 為家庭媒合社工,協助尋找並評估長者照護解決方案。

highlight.en: Offers free social-worker support to families and earns revenue through affiliate fees from the elder care products and services it recommends.
highlight.zh: 為家庭提供免費社工支援,並透過所推薦長者照護產品與服務的聯盟分潤獲利。

summary.en: Palifer builds predictive maintenance models for trains and heavy industry.
summary.zh: Palifer 為列車與重工業打造預測性維護模型。

highlight.en: Reduces unplanned failures and improves schedule compliance by extracting insights from a customer's historical equipment logs.
highlight.zh: 透過從客戶的歷史設備日誌中萃取洞見,減少非預期故障並提升排程達成率。

summary.en: Preclusio helps companies comply with privacy laws like GDPR.
summary.zh: Preclusio 協助企業遵循 GDPR 等隱私法規。

highlight.en: Targets the compliance burden of privacy regulations, giving companies tooling to meet requirements such as GDPR.
highlight.zh: 鎖定隱私法規帶來的合規負擔,提供工具協助企業滿足 GDPR 等規範。

summary.en: KubeSail makes it easy to self-host apps at home and reclaim ownership of your data.
summary.zh: KubeSail 讓你輕鬆在家自架應用程式,重新掌握自己的資料。

highlight.en: Offers home-hosting hardware and software to run apps like PhotoPrism and Minecraft, and lets companies deploy software instances on demand for users.
highlight.zh: 提供家用自架硬體與軟體以運行 PhotoPrism、Minecraft 等應用,並讓企業為使用者隨需部署軟體實例。

summary.en: Million Marker is a service for people to learn about their personal environmental exposures.
summary.zh: Million Marker 是一項讓人們了解自身環境暴露狀況的服務。

highlight.en: Its first product is a urine test that measures a person's exposure to chemicals found in everyday products.
highlight.zh: 其首款產品是一項尿液檢測,用以測量個人對日常用品中化學物質的暴露程度。

summary.en: Bouncer provides an SDK for scanning and verifying credit cards and photo IDs in mobile apps.
summary.zh: Bouncer 提供在行動應用中掃描並驗證信用卡與證件的 SDK。

highlight.en: Delivers card and ID verification as a drop-in mobile SDK, letting apps add scanning and verification without building it in-house.
highlight.zh: 以可直接嵌入的行動 SDK 形式提供卡片與證件驗證,讓應用免於自行開發掃描與驗證功能。

summary.en: Tensil turns machine learning models into custom hardware accelerators.
summary.zh: Tensil 將機器學習模型轉化為客製化硬體加速器。

highlight.en: Its algorithm automates accelerator design, claiming 10x better performance per watt-dollar than GPUs to enable ML in every device.
highlight.zh: 其演算法自動化加速器設計,宣稱每瓦每元的效能較 GPU 高出 10 倍,目標讓每台裝置都能運行 ML。

summary.en: Flowbot is a natural language-driven programming assistant.
summary.zh: Flowbot 是一款以自然語言驅動的程式設計助手。

highlight.en: Lets developers drive programming tasks through natural language rather than writing code directly.
highlight.zh: 讓開發者透過自然語言來驅動程式設計工作,而非直接撰寫程式碼。

summary.en: Blockstamp is asset management software for industrial equipment.
summary.zh: Blockstamp 是針對工業設備的資產管理軟體。

highlight.en: Provides analytics and fleet management dashboards for forklifts, cranes, and hoists to help large manufacturers make business decisions.
highlight.zh: 為堆高機、起重機與吊車提供分析與機隊管理儀表板,協助大型製造商做出商業決策。

summary.en: MoFE is a media tech company that creates and distributes high-end immersive VR experiences.
summary.zh: MoFE 是一家創作並發行高端沉浸式 VR 體驗的媒體科技公司。

highlight.en: As the Museum of Future Experiences, it produces and publishes premium immersive VR content for audiences.
highlight.zh: 以「未來體驗博物館」為名,製作並發行面向觀眾的高端沉浸式 VR 內容。

summary.en: Hey Healthcare is a health technology company.
summary.zh: Hey Healthcare 是一家醫療科技公司。

highlight.en: A health-tech venture building products in the healthcare space.
highlight.zh: 一家在醫療領域打造產品的健康科技新創。

summary.en: Prompt helps busy professionals understand and maintain their relationships.
summary.zh: Prompt 協助忙碌的專業人士理解並維繫人際關係。

highlight.en: Targets professionals who struggle to keep up with their networks, offering an app to help them maintain relationships.
highlight.zh: 鎖定難以維繫人脈的專業人士,提供一款協助他們經營人際關係的應用程式。

summary.en: Aspect lets teams build and publish user interfaces quickly.
summary.zh: Aspect 讓團隊快速建構並發布使用者介面。

highlight.en: Focuses on speeding up UI development, letting users build and ship interfaces fast.
highlight.zh: 專注於加速 UI 開發,讓使用者能快速建構並上線介面。

summary.en: GEn1E Lifesciences uses an AI platform to accelerate therapies for rare and inflammatory diseases.
summary.zh: GEn1E Lifesciences 運用 AI 平台加速罕見與發炎性疾病療法的開發。

highlight.en: Applies AI to multi-mechanism protein targets, building a pipeline of 21+ immunomodulators including a purpose-built ARDS therapy.
highlight.zh: 將 AI 應用於多重機制蛋白標靶,建立逾 21 種免疫調節劑的管線,包括一款專為 ARDS 設計的療法。

summary.en: Spice Data provides restaurant data for the enterprise.
summary.zh: Spice Data 為企業提供餐廳數據。

highlight.en: Supplies enterprise-grade restaurant data to companies that need structured insight into the food-service market.
highlight.zh: 為需要餐飲市場結構化洞見的企業提供企業級餐廳數據。

summary.en: Mipos.dev is an API to connect all the restaurant tech services across Latin America.
summary.zh: Mipos.dev 是一個串接拉丁美洲各種餐廳科技服務的 API。

highlight.en: Acts as an integration layer linking the fragmented restaurant technology services of Latin America through a single API.
highlight.zh: 作為整合層,透過單一 API 串接拉丁美洲分散的各種餐廳科技服務。

summary.en: Deepnote is a better data science notebook that brings teams together to explore and present data.
summary.zh: Deepnote 是更出色的資料科學筆記本,讓團隊共同探索並呈現資料。

highlight.en: Reimagines the notebook as a collaborative tool for the full data workflow, from exploration and analysis to sharing and presentation.
highlight.zh: 將筆記本重新設計為協作工具,涵蓋從探索、分析到分享與呈現的完整資料工作流程。

summary.en: Yassir is the leading super app for French-speaking Africa, offering rides, delivery, and finance.
summary.zh: Yassir 是法語非洲領先的超級應用程式,提供叫車、配送與金融服務。

highlight.en: Operates in 45 cities across the Maghreb plus France, Canada, and Sub-Saharan Africa, layering financial services onto ride-hailing and delivery.
highlight.zh: 營運遍及馬格里布 45 個城市,並擴展至法國、加拿大與撒哈拉以南非洲,在叫車與配送之上疊加金融服務。

summary.en: ElectroNeek is a robotic process automation and document processing platform.
summary.zh: ElectroNeek 是一個機器人流程自動化與文件處理平台。

highlight.en: Helps enterprises automate business processes with RPA workflows and extract structured data from any document type via intelligent document processing.
highlight.zh: 以 RPA 工作流程協助企業自動化業務流程,並透過智慧文件處理從任何文件類型萃取結構化資料。

summary.en: Fondeadora is a digital banking alternative connecting every Mexican to the financial system.
summary.zh: Fondeadora 是數位銀行替代方案,將每位墨西哥人連結至金融體系。

highlight.en: Offers a fee-free mobile banking app and Mastercard debit card aimed at the millions of Mexicans unhappy with or excluded from traditional banks.
highlight.zh: 提供免手續費的行動銀行應用與 Mastercard 簽帳金融卡,鎖定數百萬不滿傳統銀行或無銀行帳戶的墨西哥人。

summary.en: Riot is a SaaS platform for setting up cybersecurity awareness programs for teams.
summary.zh: Riot 是一個 SaaS 平台,協助團隊建立資安意識培訓計畫。

highlight.en: Makes it easy for fast-growing companies to protect employees with cybersecurity awareness tools, thereby protecting the company itself.
highlight.zh: 讓快速成長的公司能輕鬆以資安意識工具保護員工,進而保護公司本身。

summary.en: PostHog is a single platform to analyze, test, observe, and deploy new product features.
summary.zh: PostHog 是一個分析、測試、觀測並部署新產品功能的整合平台。

highlight.en: Bundles product analytics, session replay, feature flags, experimentation, LLM observability, and a SQL data warehouse into one tool for engineers.
highlight.zh: 將產品分析、會話重播、功能旗標、實驗、LLM 觀測與 SQL 資料倉儲整合於同一工具,服務工程師。

summary.en: Ophelia provides medication and support to beat opioid addiction from home.
summary.zh: Ophelia 提供藥物與支援,讓人在家擺脫鴉片類藥物成癮。

highlight.en: Delivers medication-assisted treatment via online doctor visits and prescriptions, a protocol it cites as 6x more effective than most rehabs.
highlight.zh: 透過線上看診與處方提供藥物輔助治療,其稱此療程的成效是多數勒戒機構的 6 倍。

summary.en: Workpay provides payroll, compliance, benefits, and Employer of Record services across Africa.
summary.zh: Workpay 在非洲各地提供薪資、合規、福利與名義雇主(EOR)服務。

highlight.en: Serves as a workforce infrastructure partner for local and cross-border teams across 50+ African countries.
highlight.zh: 作為勞動力基礎設施夥伴,服務遍及 50 多個非洲國家的本地與跨境團隊。

summary.en: Candid Health is a revenue cycle automation platform for healthcare.
summary.zh: Candid Health 是醫療領域的營收週期自動化平台。

highlight.en: Automates the healthcare revenue cycle, streamlining billing and reimbursement workflows for providers.
highlight.zh: 自動化醫療營收週期,為醫療提供者簡化計費與核銷流程。

summary.en: FUTURA is the first digital dental laboratory in Latin America.
summary.zh: FUTURA 是拉丁美洲首家數位牙科實驗室。

highlight.en: Gives dentists intraoral scanners in exchange for a minimum monthly lab spend, enabling a fully digital workflow for crowns, bridges, and prosthetics.
highlight.zh: 以最低月度實驗室消費為交換提供牙醫口內掃描器,實現牙冠、牙橋與義齒的全數位工作流程。

summary.en: Cortex is an internal developer portal that eliminates 'developer tax' and speeds engineering excellence.
summary.zh: Cortex 是消除「開發者稅」、加速工程卓越的內部開發者入口平台。

highlight.en: Lets companies like Xero, Canva, and TripAdvisor catalog, score, and assign actions to improve service quality and velocity.
highlight.zh: 讓 Xero、Canva、TripAdvisor 等公司能編目、評分並指派行動,以提升服務品質與開發速度。

summary.en: AIOS builds AI-native infrastructure to deliver consumer healthcare with near-zero marginal human time.
summary.zh: AIOS 打造 AI 原生基礎設施,以近乎零的人力邊際時間提供消費者醫療服務。

highlight.en: Powers its own brands like Bolt Pharmacy and Fella Health, automating legacy care workflows to deliver treatment, starting with excess bodyweight.
highlight.zh: 驅動 Bolt Pharmacy、Fella Health 等自有品牌,自動化傳統照護流程以提供治療,並從體重過重議題切入。

summary.en: Belvo is an open finance API platform for Latin America.
summary.zh: Belvo 是拉丁美洲的開放金融 API 平台。

highlight.en: A 'Plaid for Latam' that lets any company or developer access and interpret end-users' financial data through one API.
highlight.zh: 作為「拉美版 Plaid」,讓任何公司或開發者透過單一 API 存取並解讀終端用戶的金融資料。

summary.en: Airbyte is a context layer for production-grade AI agents, plus an open data movement platform.
summary.zh: Airbyte 是面向生產級 AI 代理的情境層,並提供開源資料搬移平台。

highlight.en: Its Context Store unifies entities across Salesforce, Stripe, and Zendesk for AI agents, claiming 40% fewer tool calls and up to 80% fewer tokens.
highlight.zh: 其情境儲存庫為 AI 代理整合 Salesforce、Stripe、Zendesk 等實體,宣稱可減少 40% 工具呼叫與最多 80% token。

summary.en: borong is a SaaS-enabled marketplace connecting brands with local independent retailers.
summary.zh: borong 是一個結合 SaaS 的市集,串接品牌與本地獨立零售商。

highlight.en: Brings real-time connectivity to the fragmented wholesale supply chain across Malaysia and Southeast Asia, letting retailers discover and manage inventory.
highlight.zh: 為馬來西亞與東南亞分散的批發供應鏈帶來即時連結,讓零售商能探索並管理庫存。

summary.en: Ansa Biotechnologies develops next-generation DNA synthesis using enzymes.
summary.zh: Ansa Biotechnologies 開發採用酵素的新一代 DNA 合成技術。

highlight.en: Replaces the 35-year-old chemical method of making DNA with a faster, cleaner, more accurate enzyme-based approach for research and biomanufacturing.
highlight.zh: 以更快速、潔淨且精準的酵素方法,取代沿用 35 年的化學 DNA 合成法,服務研究與生物製造。

summary.en: QueryPie AI is an enterprise-ready agentic AI platform.
summary.zh: QueryPie AI 是一個面向企業就緒的代理式 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Built on MCP architecture, it securely runs AI agents in enterprises by connecting internal data and systems with access control and central management.
highlight.zh: 基於 MCP 架構,透過串接內部資料與系統並施行存取控制與集中管理,在企業環境中安全運行 AI 代理。

summary.en: OpenBiome is a nonprofit stool bank enabling access to fecal transplants.
summary.zh: OpenBiome 是一家非營利糞便庫,協助人們取得糞便移植治療。

highlight.en: Expands safe access to fecal transplants while catalyzing research on the human microbiome.
highlight.zh: 擴大糞便移植的安全可及性,同時推動人類微生物群的研究。

summary.en: Stark Bank is a challenger bank for enterprises.
summary.zh: Stark Bank 是面向企業的挑戰者銀行。

highlight.en: Provides modern banking built for businesses, aiming to take enterprise financial operations to the next level.
highlight.zh: 提供專為企業打造的現代化銀行服務,旨在將企業財務營運提升至新層次。

summary.en: Ramani is building financial infrastructure for Africa's supply chains.
summary.zh: Ramani 正為非洲的供應鏈打造金融基礎設施。

highlight.en: Started with an app for salespeople to track inventory, register customers, and record sales transactions across supply chains.
highlight.zh: 從一款供業務人員追蹤庫存、登錄客戶並記錄銷售交易的應用程式起步,服務供應鏈。

summary.en: Pulley helps founders and finance teams manage their equity and cap tables.
summary.zh: Pulley 協助創辦人與財務團隊管理股權與股權結構表。

highlight.en: Lets early-stage founders model funding scenarios, set up equity grants, avoid costly equity mistakes, and stay ahead of tax filings.
highlight.zh: 讓早期創辦人能模擬募資情境、設定股權授予、避免代價高昂的股權錯誤,並提前處理稅務申報。

summary.en: Motion is a work management platform built for both human and AI employees.
summary.zh: Motion 是同時為人類與 AI 員工打造的工作管理平台。

highlight.en: An AI-native productivity suite where users build and manage AI Employees alongside project management, calendar, docs, and contextual search.
highlight.zh: 一套 AI 原生生產力套件,讓使用者在專案管理、行事曆、文件與情境搜尋之外,建構並管理 AI 員工。

summary.en: Farmtheory is a B2B agri-tech delivering vegetables to restaurants in India.
summary.zh: Farmtheory 是一家 B2B 農業科技公司,為印度餐廳配送蔬菜。

highlight.en: Bridges buyers and sellers of 'ugly produce' — freshly harvested but cosmetically unappealing fruit and veg left unsold at farms.
highlight.zh: 串接「醜蔬果」的買賣雙方——這些是新鮮採收但外觀不討喜、滯留農場未售出的蔬果。

summary.en: Morphle Labs builds robotic microscopes and automation for cancer diagnostics.
summary.zh: Morphle Labs 打造用於癌症診斷的機器人顯微鏡與自動化設備。

highlight.en: Applies robotic automation to cancer diagnostics through robotic microscopes and related lab tooling.
highlight.zh: 透過機器人顯微鏡與相關實驗室工具,將機器人自動化應用於癌症診斷。

summary.en: BeGo connects cargo shippers with truck suppliers in Mexico and the US.
summary.zh: BeGo 在墨西哥與美國串接貨運託運人與卡車供應商。

highlight.en: Uses machine learning to cut empty returns and deadheads, addressing trucks that roll empty 40% of the time despite strong demand.
highlight.zh: 運用機器學習減少空車返程與空駛,改善卡車儘管需求旺盛卻有 40% 時間空載的問題。

summary.en: Nexu is a financing platform for car dealerships in Latin America.
summary.zh: Nexu 是拉丁美洲汽車經銷商的融資平台。

highlight.en: Provides financing infrastructure that helps Latin American car dealerships offer credit to buyers.
highlight.zh: 提供融資基礎設施,協助拉美汽車經銷商為買家提供信貸。

summary.en: Termii is an AI-native reliability infrastructure company.
summary.zh: Termii 是一家 AI 原生的可靠性基礎設施公司。

highlight.en: Uses AI to prevent transactions like logins, payments, and OTPs from failing, processing 3B+ transactions for banks, fintechs, and e-commerce.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 防止登入、支付、OTP 等交易失敗,為銀行、金融科技與電商處理逾 30 億筆交易。

summary.en: TrueNorth gives truckers a single place to manage their business.
summary.zh: TrueNorth 為卡車司機提供管理其業務的單一平台。

highlight.en: Replaces the paper, emails, and phone calls of trucking with an end-to-end solution for customer management, load coordination, invoicing, and instant payments.
highlight.zh: 以涵蓋客戶管理、貨載調度、開立發票與即時付款的端到端方案,取代卡車業的紙本、電郵與電話作業。

summary.en: Kosh is a digital lending platform creating Microfinance 2.0 for blue-collar workers in India.
summary.zh: Kosh 是一個數位借貸平台,為印度藍領勞工打造微型金融 2.0。

highlight.en: Uses a joint liability model whose social underwriting controls credit risk and lowers costs, making a 150M-strong segment credit-worthy.
highlight.zh: 採用聯保模式,以社會性核保控制信用風險並降低成本,使一個 1.5 億人的族群具備信用資格。

summary.en: Datasaur builds a data labeling and workforce management platform for NLP.
summary.zh: Datasaur 為 NLP 打造資料標註與勞動力管理平台。

highlight.en: Offers human-centric NLP/LLM labeling tools with built-in intelligence to augment labelers, assign projects, and cross-validate results.
highlight.zh: 提供以人為本的 NLP/LLM 標註工具,內建智慧以輔助標註人員、指派專案並交叉驗證結果。

summary.en: UrbanKisaan builds foundation models and autonomous chambers for plant biology.
summary.zh: UrbanKisaan 為植物生物學打造基礎模型與自主培育艙。

highlight.en: Trains three foundation models — reading plant DNA, predicting phenotype, and more — on the physical infrastructure it builds, closing the breeding loop.
highlight.zh: 在自建的實體基礎設施上訓練三個基礎模型——解讀植物 DNA、預測表現型等——以閉合育種循環。

summary.en: HelpNow is an aggregated ambulance network for India — an 'Uber for ambulances'.
summary.zh: HelpNow 是印度的整合救護車網路,堪稱「救護車版 Uber」。

highlight.en: Builds a network of ambulances and ridesharing cabs converted into medical first responders to drastically reduce medical arrival time in India.
highlight.zh: 建立由救護車與改裝為醫療第一線救援的共乘車組成的網路,大幅縮短印度的醫療抵達時間。

summary.en: SINAI is enterprise software to quantify cost-effective decarbonization.
summary.zh: SINAI 是量化具成本效益減碳路徑的企業軟體。

highlight.en: Helps carbon-intensive companies price carbon emissions, manage carbon taxes, and reduce emissions in the most cost-effective way.
highlight.zh: 協助高碳排企業為碳排放定價、管理碳稅,並以最具成本效益的方式減少排放。

summary.en: Welcome lets you create virtual events that feel like an Apple Keynote.
summary.zh: Welcome 讓你打造宛如 Apple 發表會般的虛擬活動。

highlight.en: Focuses on high-production-value virtual events, aiming to make online gatherings feel polished and jaw-dropping.
highlight.zh: 專注於高製作水準的虛擬活動,力求讓線上聚會呈現精緻且令人驚艷的效果。

summary.en: Upflow builds cash collection technology to help B2B businesses get paid faster.
summary.zh: Upflow 打造現金收款技術,協助 B2B 企業更快收到款項。

highlight.en: Brings the fragmented order-to-cash process into one system with data, agentic automation, and financial services, serving 500+ companies across 30+ countries.
highlight.zh: 以資料、代理式自動化與金融服務將分散的訂單到收款流程整合為單一系統,服務 30 多國逾 500 家公司。

summary.en: Able is a career app and placement platform for early professionals in India.
summary.zh: Able 是印度面向早期專業人士的職涯應用與就業媒合平台。

highlight.en: Lets pre- and early-career professionals build profiles, apply for jobs, prepare for interviews, and upskill through training programs.
highlight.zh: 讓初入職場與早期專業人士能建立檔案、應徵工作、準備面試,並透過培訓計畫提升技能。

summary.en: Orchata delivers groceries and daily essentials in 20 minutes across Latin America.
summary.zh: Orchata 在拉丁美洲於 20 分鐘內配送雜貨與日常必需品。

highlight.en: Runs darkstores with all-in-one software, following the Gopuff playbook to serve LATAM's $451B grocery market with no substitutes at supermarket prices.
highlight.zh: 以一站式軟體經營暗倉,效法 Gopuff 模式服務拉美 4,510 億美元的雜貨市場,以超市價格且不替換商品。

summary.en: Tajir is the one-stop shop for mom-and-pop stores in Pakistan to buy inventory.
summary.zh: Tajir 是巴基斯坦雜貨小店採購庫存的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Replaces dozens of unreliable suppliers with 24/7 ordering, low prices, huge selection, and next-day delivery for Pakistan's mom-and-pop stores.
highlight.zh: 以全天候下單、低價、豐富選擇與次日配送,取代數十家不可靠的供應商,服務巴基斯坦的雜貨小店。

summary.en: Ochre Bio develops RNA medicines for chronic liver diseases.
summary.zh: Ochre Bio 開發治療慢性肝病的 RNA 藥物。

highlight.en: A biotech focused specifically on RNA-based therapeutics for chronic liver disease.
highlight.zh: 一家專注於慢性肝病 RNA 療法的生物科技公司。

summary.en: CARUPI is a managed peer-to-peer marketplace for used cars.
summary.zh: CARUPI 是一個受管理的二手車 P2P 市集。

highlight.en: Like Airbnb for used cars, it handles each transaction end-to-end as a concierge — photos, ads, insured test drives, paperwork — with no inventory.
highlight.zh: 猶如二手車版 Airbnb,以管家角色端到端處理每筆交易——拍照、刊登、投保試駕、文件——且不持有庫存。

summary.en: Paragon is the embedded integration platform for SaaS apps.
summary.zh: Paragon 是面向 SaaS 應用的嵌入式整合平台。

highlight.en: Lets software companies integrate with hundreds of SaaS apps in minutes while giving their customers a seamless, unified integration experience.
highlight.zh: 讓軟體公司能在數分鐘內整合數百個 SaaS 應用,同時為其客戶提供無縫且統一的整合體驗。

summary.en: Fly.io runs full-stack apps and databases close to your users.
summary.zh: Fly.io 讓全端應用與資料庫運行在貼近使用者的位置。

highlight.en: Lets developers deploy a Docker image and launch app-server and database instances in the regions most important to their application.
highlight.zh: 讓開發者部署 Docker 映像檔,並在對其應用最關鍵的區域啟動應用伺服器與資料庫實例。

summary.en: Benepass is fintech that consolidates corporate benefits onto a single card.
summary.zh: Benepass 是將企業福利整合到單一卡片的金融科技。

highlight.en: Powered by an in-house payments stack, it puts tax-advantaged benefits and company stipends like wellness and WFH on one card and app.
highlight.zh: 以自建支付系統為基礎,將稅務優惠福利與健康、遠距辦公等公司津貼整合於一張卡片與一個應用中。

summary.en: Ello is building the world's first 1:1 AI teacher.
summary.zh: Ello 正在打造全球首位一對一的 AI 老師。

highlight.en: Aims to deliver personalized one-on-one instruction at scale through an AI teacher.
highlight.zh: 目標透過 AI 老師,大規模提供個人化的一對一教學。

summary.en: Checkars is an e-commerce site to buy certified used cars in Latin America.
summary.zh: Checkars 是在拉丁美洲購買認證二手車的電商網站。

highlight.en: Removes hassle and distrust from used-car deals, reporting 1000+ transactions and an NPS above 85 in its first 18 months.
highlight.zh: 消除二手車交易的麻煩與不信任,稱在前 18 個月內完成逾 1,000 筆交易、NPS 高於 85。

summary.en: MindsDB lets you connect, unify, and respond to data anywhere with human-level AI.
summary.zh: MindsDB 讓你以接近人類水準的 AI 連接、整合並回應任何地方的資料。

highlight.en: An open-source AI-data platform with 700+ contributors that helps teams move from prototyping to production AI in a fast and scalable way.
highlight.zh: 一個擁有逾 700 名貢獻者的開源 AI 資料平台,協助團隊快速且可擴展地從原型走向生產級 AI。

summary.en: CrowdForce is an app that lets any local merchant in Africa become a bank branch within minutes.
summary.zh: CrowdForce 是一款讓非洲任何本地商家在數分鐘內成為銀行分行的應用程式。

highlight.en: Turns everyday local merchants, starting in Nigeria, into agent banking points to expand financial access across Africa.
highlight.zh: 從奈及利亞起步,將日常本地商家轉變為代理銀行據點,以擴大非洲的金融可及性。

summary.en: Karat Financial builds better financial services for digital creators.
summary.zh: Karat Financial 為數位創作者打造更好的金融服務。

highlight.en: Treats creators as businesses, building a one-stop shop for managing their revenues, expenses, savings, credit, and banking.
highlight.zh: 將創作者視為事業體,打造一站式平台來管理其收入、支出、儲蓄、信用與銀行業務。

summary.en: Taiv is AI-powered tech that makes business TV smarter and more engaging.
summary.zh: Taiv 是以 AI 驅動的技術,讓商業場所的電視更智慧、更吸引人。

highlight.en: Its AI analyzes live video and swaps content during commercial breaks; it is free to venues, earning revenue from ads shared back with them.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 分析即時影像並在廣告時段切換內容;對場所免費,透過與場所分潤的廣告獲利。

summary.en: PostEra applies machine learning to accelerate medicinal chemistry.
summary.zh: PostEra 運用機器學習加速藥物化學。

highlight.en: Advances small-molecule programs via biopharma partnerships and its own pipeline, and led COVID Moonshot, the largest open-science drug discovery effort.
highlight.zh: 透過與生技藥廠合作及自有管線推進小分子計畫,並主導全球最大的開放科學藥物研發專案 COVID Moonshot。

summary.en: Pahamify is a college entrance test preparation app for students in Indonesia.
summary.zh: Pahamify 是面向印尼學生的大學入學測驗備考應用程式。

highlight.en: An online learning platform offering K-12 educational videos and thousands of practice questions aligned to Indonesia's curriculum and entry tests.
highlight.zh: 一個線上學習平台,提供對應印尼課綱與入學測驗的 K-12 教學影片及數千道練習題。

summary.en: Living Carbon maximizes biomass on low-quality land using precision breeding.
summary.zh: Living Carbon 運用精準育種,在劣質土地上最大化生物量。

highlight.en: Transforms degraded land into high-quality environmental assets through end-to-end operational expertise and precision breeding.
highlight.zh: 透過端到端的營運專業與精準育種,將退化土地轉化為優質的環境資產。

summary.en: Tienda Crypto is a crypto exchange and payment API gateway for Latin America.
summary.zh: Tienda Crypto 是面向拉丁美洲的加密貨幣交易所與支付 API 閘道。

highlight.en: Its Tienda Dólar product positions crypto as a way for Latin Americans to protect their savings.
highlight.zh: 其 Tienda Dólar 產品將加密貨幣定位為拉美民眾保護儲蓄的方式。

summary.en: Facio provides salary advances to employees in Brazil.
summary.zh: Facio 為巴西的員工提供薪資預支服務。

highlight.en: Offers earned-wage access that lets Brazilian employees draw on their salary before payday.
highlight.zh: 提供已賺取薪資的預支服務,讓巴西員工能在發薪日前動用薪水。

summary.en: Replicate lets you run machine learning models in the cloud.
summary.zh: Replicate 讓你在雲端運行機器學習模型。

highlight.en: Provides cloud infrastructure for running machine learning models without managing the underlying hardware.
highlight.zh: 提供雲端基礎設施以運行機器學習模型,無需自行管理底層硬體。

summary.en: Segmed provides real-world clinical data and medical imaging for health innovation.
summary.zh: Segmed 為醫療創新提供真實世界臨床數據與醫學影像。

highlight.en: Offers at-scale access to millions of diagnostic-grade medical images, helping life sciences accelerate research and disease-detection models.
highlight.zh: 大規模提供數百萬張診斷級醫學影像,協助生命科學加速研究與疾病偵測模型的開發。

summary.en: Eze is an all-in-one hub to track, buy, and sell a company's tech assets.
summary.zh: Eze 是追蹤、採購並出售公司科技資產的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Combines IT asset tracking, procurement from vetted suppliers, and buybacks or recycling to recover value from retired equipment.
highlight.zh: 整合 IT 資產追蹤、向認證供應商採購,以及回購或回收,從退役設備中回收價值。

summary.en: Metaplane is a data observability platform for modern data teams.
summary.zh: Metaplane 是面向現代資料團隊的資料可觀測性平台。

highlight.en: Used by Bose, Ramp, and Klaviyo, it uses ML anomaly detection and column-level lineage to catch data issues before stakeholders notice.
highlight.zh: 被 Bose、Ramp、Klaviyo 採用,運用 ML 異常偵測與欄位級血緣,在利害關係人察覺前攔截資料問題。

summary.en: SOMATIC builds bathroom cleaning robots for office buildings.
summary.zh: SOMATIC 打造用於辦公大樓的廁所清潔機器人。

highlight.en: Develops autonomous robots dedicated to cleaning restrooms in commercial office buildings.
highlight.zh: 開發專門清潔商業辦公大樓廁所的自主機器人。

summary.en: Genecis Bio makes guilt-free plastics from food waste.
summary.zh: Genecis Bio 以廚餘製造無負擔的塑膠。

highlight.en: Converts food waste into bioplastics, offering a sustainable alternative to conventional plastics.
highlight.zh: 將廚餘轉化為生物塑膠,提供傳統塑膠的永續替代方案。

summary.en: Teleo converts heavy equipment into supervised autonomous robots.
summary.zh: Teleo 將重型設備改造為受監督的自主機器人。

highlight.en: Turns dozers, trucks, and loaders into autonomous machines so one remote operator can run several at once, boosting contractor productivity.
highlight.zh: 將推土機、卡車與裝載機改造為自主機械,讓一名遠端操作員同時操控多台,提升承包商生產力。

summary.en: Grain transforms the debit card you already have into a credit card.
summary.zh: Grain 將你既有的簽帳金融卡轉變為信用卡。

highlight.en: Links your existing debit card to a cash-flow-based line of credit, offering millennials, Gen Z, and immigrants an alternative to credit card debt.
highlight.zh: 將你既有的簽帳金融卡連結至以現金流為依據的信用額度,為千禧世代、Z 世代與移民提供信用卡債務的替代方案。

summary.en: Kinter is a new kind of AI-powered tool for finance teams.
summary.zh: Kinter 是一款為財務團隊打造的新型 AI 工具。

highlight.en: Lets organizations like Amazon, Mastercard, and UPS supplement their workforce with AI Accountants that execute the accounting close.
highlight.zh: 讓 Amazon、Mastercard、UPS 等組織以執行會計結算的 AI 會計師補充其人力。

summary.en: PillarPlus is software that automatically creates construction blueprints.
summary.zh: PillarPlus 是自動生成建築藍圖的軟體。

highlight.en: Automates the manual design of a building's mechanical, fire, electrical, and plumbing services and calculates the bill of materials and cost estimates.
highlight.zh: 自動化建築機械、消防、電氣與水管系統的人工設計,並計算材料清單與專案成本估算。

summary.en: TagMango is a monetization tool for the Indian creator economy.
summary.zh: TagMango 是印度創作者經濟的變現工具。

highlight.en: A SaaS tool that lets edutainment creators build paid, scalable communities and offer exclusive services, learnings, and content to their audience.
highlight.zh: 一款 SaaS 工具,讓寓教於樂的創作者建立付費且可擴展的社群,向其受眾提供獨家服務、學習與內容。

summary.en: Synapsica Healthcare provides AI-enabled automation of diagnostic radiology workflow and reporting.
summary.zh: Synapsica Healthcare 提供 AI 驅動的診斷放射工作流程與報告自動化。

highlight.en: Applies AI to automate radiology workflows and reporting, streamlining how diagnostic imaging is processed and documented.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 自動化放射工作流程與報告,簡化診斷影像的處理與記錄方式。

summary.en: Stable is a virtual address and mailbox for businesses.
summary.zh: Stable 是為企業提供的虛擬地址與信箱。

highlight.en: Gives startups one permanent address with compliant switching guidance, plus a platform to open, forward, and shred mail with OCR and integrations.
highlight.zh: 為新創提供單一永久地址與合規的地址變更指引,並提供可拆閱、轉寄、銷毀郵件並支援 OCR 與整合的平台。

summary.en: Recall.ai is the API to get recordings, transcripts, and metadata from meetings.
summary.zh: Recall.ai 是從會議取得錄影、逐字稿與中介資料的 API。

highlight.en: Captures meeting data via bots and desktop/mobile SDKs across Zoom, Meet, and Teams, used by 3000+ companies to process millions of hours.
highlight.zh: 透過機器人及桌面/行動 SDK 在 Zoom、Meet、Teams 等平台擷取會議資料,逾 3,000 家公司用以處理數百萬小時內容。
